title: Man on the Tracks
actors: Kazimierz Opalinski, Zygmunt Maciejewski, Zygmunt Zintel
plot: In 1950, at night, a passenger train kills a man on the tracks. He is Orzechowski, an engineer since 1914. An inquiry immediately follows. Testimony takes the form of flashbacks. Tuszka, the station master, believes Orzechowski wa...
